ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datamarts" (
  "datamart_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each datamart */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the datamart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the datamart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the datamart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the datamart */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the datamart */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the datamart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datamart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "datamart_id" TEXT /* ID of the datamart the query is executed on */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the query package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the query package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the query package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the query was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the query */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the query */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the query */,
  "last_executed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last execution of the query */,
  "execution_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the query is executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_datamart_id FOREIGN KEY ("datamart_id") REFERENCES datamarts ("datamart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the response is for */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was received */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data returned by the query */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the response */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the response */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the query */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Duration of the query execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispenses" (
  "dispense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dispense event */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the dispense event is for */,
  "dispense_date" TEXT /* Date the dispense event occurred */,
  "record_n" INTEGER /* Number of records dispensed */,
  "distinct_patid_n" INTEGER /* Number of distinct patient IDs dispensed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dispense event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dispense event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dispense event */,
  "dispensed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who dispensed the data */,
  "dispense_type" TEXT /* Type of dispense event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dispenses_dispensed_by FOREIGN KEY ("dispensed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dispenses_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the patient record */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider information */,
  "primary_doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary doctor assigned to the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_primary_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the treatment is for */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment occurred */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the treatment record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the treatment */,
  "prescribed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who prescribed the treatment */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Detailed treatment plan */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
